350.en: It was narrated from Asma' bint Abi Bakr (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about menstrual blood that gets on a garment.' He said: 'Scrape it, then sprinkle it with water.'
350.id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma' bint Abi Bakr (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Saya bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang darah haid yang mengenai pakaian.' Beliau berkata: 'Kikislah, kemudian percikkan dengan air.'

351.en: Ibrahim said: 'A menstruating woman does not need to wash her garment if there is no blood in it.'
351.id: Ibrahim berkata: 'Wanita haid tidak perlu mencuci pakaiannya jika tidak ada darah di dalamnya.'

352.en: It was narrated from Asma' bint Abi Bakr (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I heard a woman ask the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about her garment when she becomes pure from her menstruation — what should she do with it?' He said: 'If you see blood on it, scrape it, then squeeze it with water (washing it by pinching), then sprinkle the rest of it, and pray in it.'
352.id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma' bint Abi Bakr (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Saya mendengar seorang wanita bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang pakaiannya ketika ia suci dari haidnya — apa yang harus ia lakukan dengannya?' Beliau berkata: 'Jika kamu melihat darah di atasnya, kikislah, kemudian peras dengan air (cuci dengan mencubit), kemudian percikkan sisanya, dan shalat di dalamnya.'

353.en: It was narrated from Umm Qays (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I asked the Prophet ﷺ about menstrual blood that gets on a garment.' He said: 'Wash it with water and lotus leaves and scrape it with a rib (bone).'
353.id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Qays (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Saya bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ tentang darah haid yang mengenai pakaian.' Beliau berkata: 'Cucilah dengan air dan daun bidara dan kikislah dengan tulang rusuk.'

354.en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a woman asked her about menstrual blood on her garment. She said: 'Let her wash it with water.' The woman said: 'We wash it but the mark remains.' She said: 'Water is purifying.'
354.id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang wanita bertanya kepadanya tentang darah haid pada pakaiannya. Ia berkata: 'Hendaklah ia mencucinya dengan air.' Wanita itu berkata: 'Kami mencucinya tetapi bekasnya tetap ada.' Ia berkata: 'Air itu menyucikan.'

355.en: It was narrated from 'Ata' that Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) used to see menstrual blood on her garment and scrape it with a stone, a stick, or a horn, then sprinkle it with water.
355.id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Atha' bahwa Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) biasa melihat darah haid pada pakaiannya dan mengikisnya dengan batu, tongkat, atau tanduk, kemudian memercikkannya dengan air.

356.en: Sa'id ibn Jubayr was asked about a person in janabah who sweats in a garment and then wipes it. He said: 'There is no harm in it.'
356.id: Sa'id ibn Jubayr ditanya tentang orang yang junub yang berkeringat di pakaian kemudian menyekanya. Ia berkata: 'Tidak ada masalah dengan itu.'

357.en: Sa'id ibn Jubayr used to see no harm in the sweat of a person in janabah on a garment.
357.id: Sa'id ibn Jubayr biasa tidak melihat masalah pada keringat orang yang junub di pakaian.

358.en: Al-Sha'bi used to see no harm in it.
358.id: Al-Sya'bi biasa tidak melihat masalah dengan itu.

359.en: Al-Hasan said: 'Not all of the Companions of the Prophet ﷺ had two garments.' He said: 'When you bathe, are you not wearing it? So one cancels out the other.'
359.id: Al-Hasan berkata: 'Tidak semua sahabat Nabi ﷺ memiliki dua pakaian.' Ia berkata: 'Ketika kamu mandi, apakah kamu tidak memakainya? Jadi satu menghapus yang lain.'

360.en: It was narrated that Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) was asked about a man who is intimate with his wife and then puts on the garment and sweats in it — she saw no harm in it.
360.id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) ditanya tentang seorang laki-laki yang berhubungan intim dengan istrinya kemudian memakai pakaian dan berkeringat di dalamnya — ia tidak melihat masalah dengan itu.

361.en: 'Ata' said: 'There is no harm in a person in janabah or a menstruating woman sweating in a garment that is to be prayed in.'
361.id: 'Atha' berkata: 'Tidak ada masalah bagi orang yang junub atau wanita haid berkeringat di pakaian yang akan digunakan untuk shalat.'

362.en: Ibrahim, regarding a person in janabah who sweats in his garment, said: 'It does not harm him, and he does not need to sprinkle it with water.'
362.id: Ibrahim, mengenai orang yang junub yang berkeringat di pakaiannya, berkata: 'Itu tidak membahayakannya, dan ia tidak perlu memercikkannya dengan air.'

363.en: Ibrahim, regarding a menstruating woman who sweats in her garments, said: 'It suffices her to sprinkle them with water.'
363.id: Ibrahim, mengenai wanita haid yang berkeringat di pakaiannya, berkata: 'Cukup baginya memercikkannya dengan air.'

364.en: It was narrated from Ibn 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that he used to sweat in a garment while in janabah, then pray in it.
364.id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia biasa berkeringat di pakaian saat junub, kemudian shalat di dalamnya.

365.en: Ibn 'Abbas (may Allah be pleased with them both) used to see no harm in the sweat of a menstruating woman or a person in janabah.
365.id: Ibn 'Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) biasa tidak melihat masalah pada keringat wanita haid atau orang yang junub.

366.en: It was narrated that a man asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: 'What is permissible for me from my wife when she is menstruating?' He said: 'Let her fasten her lower garment (izaar), then it is your affair with what is above it.'
366.id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang laki-laki bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ: 'Apa yang halal bagiku dari istriku ketika ia sedang haid?' Beliau berkata: 'Biarkan ia mengikat pakaian bawahnya (izaar), kemudian itu urusanmu dengan apa yang ada di atasnya.'

367.en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), who was asked: 'May a man be intimate with his wife when she is menstruating?' She said: 'Let her fasten her lower garment over her lower half, then he may be intimate with her.'
367.id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha), yang ditanya: 'Bolehkah seorang laki-laki berhubungan intim dengan istrinya ketika ia sedang haid?' Ia berkata: 'Biarkan ia mengikat pakaian bawahnya di bagian bawahnya, kemudian ia boleh berhubungan intim dengannya.'

368.en: Ibrahim said: 'A husband may come to a menstruating wife in her lower abdomen and between her thighs. If he ejaculates, she washes what was affected, and he himself bathes.'
368.id: Ibrahim berkata: 'Seorang suami boleh mendatangi istri yang sedang haid di perut bawahnya dan di antara pahanya. Jika ia ejakulasi, ia mencuci apa yang terkena, dan ia sendiri mandi.'

369.en: Ibrahim said: 'Umm 'Imran knows that I touch her buttocks, meaning while she is menstruating.'
369.id: Ibrahim berkata: 'Umm 'Imran tahu bahwa saya menyentuh bokongnya, yaitu ketika ia sedang haid.'

370.en: 'Ata' was asked about a menstruating woman, and he saw no harm in what is short of blood.
370.id: 'Atha' ditanya tentang wanita haid, dan ia tidak melihat masalah dalam apa yang tidak melibatkan darah.

371.en: Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) said: 'Whenever I menstruated, the Prophet ﷺ would command me to fasten a lower garment, and he would be intimate with me.'
371.id: Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) berkata: 'Setiap kali saya haid, Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan saya untuk mengenakan pakaian bawah, dan beliau berhubungan intim denganku.'

372.en: Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) was asked: 'What is permissible for a man from his wife when she is menstruating?' She said: 'What is above the izaar (lower garment).'
372.id: Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) ditanya: 'Apa yang halal bagi seorang laki-laki dari istrinya ketika ia sedang haid?' Ia berkata: 'Apa yang ada di atas izaar (pakaian bawah).'

373.en: Masruq said: 'I asked Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her): What is permissible for a man from his wife when she is menstruating?' She said: 'Everything except intercourse.' He said: 'What is forbidden to him from her when they are both in ihram?' She said: 'Everything except speech.'
373.id: Masruq berkata: 'Saya bertanya kepada Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha): Apa yang halal bagi seorang laki-laki dari istrinya ketika ia sedang haid?' Ia berkata: 'Segalanya kecuali jima'.' Ia berkata: 'Apa yang dilarang baginya dari istrinya ketika keduanya sedang ihram?' Ia berkata: 'Segalanya kecuali pembicaraan.'

374.en: Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) said to someone: 'Avoid the area of blood.'
374.id: Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) berkata kepada seseorang: 'Jauhilah area darah.'

375.en: Al-Sha'bi said: 'When the harm — meaning the blood — has stopped (then intimacy is permitted).'
375.id: Al-Sya'bi berkata: 'Ketika bahaya — yaitu darah — telah berhenti (maka boleh berhubungan intim).'

376.en: Mujahid said: 'There is no harm in being intimate with a menstruating woman between her thighs and at her navel.'
376.id: Mujahid berkata: 'Tidak ada masalah dalam berhubungan intim dengan wanita haid di antara pahanya dan di pusarnya.'

377.en: Mujahid said: '(A man may approach his wife) from front or behind, except the anus and the place of menstruation.'
377.id: Mujahid berkata: '(Seorang laki-laki boleh mendatangi istrinya) dari depan atau belakang, kecuali anus dan tempat haid.'

378.en: It was narrated from Umm Salamah (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I was with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ under a blanket, and I experienced what women experience. I got up, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Have you begun menstruating?" I said: "I experienced what women experience." He said: "That is what Allah has decreed for the daughters of Adam."' She said: 'So I got up and took care of myself, then returned. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Come under the blanket"—and I entered.'
378.id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Salamah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Saya sedang bersama Rasulullah ﷺ di bawah selimut, dan saya merasakan apa yang dirasakan wanita. Saya bangun, dan Rasulullah ﷺ berkata: "Apakah kamu mulai haid?" Saya berkata: "Saya merasakan apa yang dirasakan wanita." Beliau berkata: "Itulah yang Allah tetapkan bagi putri-putri Adam."' Ia berkata: 'Maka saya bangun dan mengurus diri saya, kemudian kembali. Rasulullah ﷺ berkata: "Masuklah ke dalam selimut" — dan saya masuk.'

379.en: It was narrated from Umm Salamah (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'While I was lying with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in the khamilah (a thick blanket), I began to menstruate. I slipped away and took my menstrual garments. He said: "Have you begun menstruating?" I said: "Yes." She said: "He called me and I lay with him in the khamilah."' She said: 'She and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to bathe from the same vessel after janabah (ritual impurity), and he would kiss her while fasting.'
379.id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Salamah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika saya berbaring bersama Rasulullah ﷺ di khamilah (selimut tebal), saya mulai haid. Saya menyelinap pergi dan mengambil pakaian haid saya. Beliau berkata: "Apakah kamu mulai haid?" Saya berkata: "Ya."' Ia berkata: '"Beliau memanggilku dan saya berbaring bersamanya di khamilah."' Ia berkata: 'Ia dan Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mandi dari satu bejana setelah janabah (hadas besar), dan beliau menciumnya saat berpuasa.'

380.en: It was narrated from Maymunah (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to be intimate with his wives above the izaar (lower garment) when they were menstruating.'
380.id: Diriwayatkan dari Maymunah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berhubungan intim dengan istri-istrinya di atas izaar (pakaian bawah) ketika mereka sedang haid.'

381.en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to command one of us when she was menstruating to fasten her lower garment, and then he would be intimate with her.'
381.id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa memerintahkan salah seorang dari kami ketika ia sedang haid untuk mengikat pakaian bawahnya, kemudian beliau berhubungan intim dengannya.'

382.en: Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) said: 'I used to fasten a lower garment while menstruating, then enter with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ under his blanket.'
382.id: Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) berkata: 'Saya biasa mengenakan pakaian bawah saat haid, kemudian masuk bersama Rasulullah ﷺ di bawah selimutnya.'

383.en: Ibn Jubayr was asked: 'What is permissible for a man from his wife when she is menstruating?' He said: 'What is above the izaar.'
383.id: Ibn Jubayr ditanya: 'Apa yang halal bagi seorang laki-laki dari istrinya ketika ia sedang haid?' Ia berkata: 'Apa yang ada di atas izaar.'

384.en: 'Abidah, regarding a menstruating woman, said: 'The bed is one, and the blankets are separate. If they do not have enough, he extends part of his blanket over her.'
384.id: 'Abidah, mengenai wanita haid, berkata: 'Tempat tidurnya satu, dan selimutnya terpisah. Jika mereka tidak memiliki cukup, ia merentangkan sebagian selimutnya atasnya.'

385.en: Shurayh said to him (Ibn Sirin): 'What is above the navel or the belly button.'
385.id: Shurayh berkata kepadanya (Ibn Sirin): 'Apa yang ada di atas pusar atau pusar.'

386.en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to embrace me while I was menstruating, and engage with my hair and the area between us with a garment.'
386.id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa merangkulku saat saya sedang haid, dan berinteraksi dengan rambutku serta area antara kami dengan ada pakaian di antara kami.'

387.en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that when a woman among the Jews menstruated, they would not eat with her, would not drink with her, would expel her from the house, and she would not be with them in the houses. The Prophet ﷺ was asked about this, and Allah, the Exalted, revealed: "They ask you about menstruation. Say: It is harm" [Al-Baqarah: 222]. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded them to eat with them, drink with them, have them in the houses, and do everything except intercourse. The Jews said: 'This man does not want to leave anything of our practice without opposing us in it.' 'Abbad ibn Bishr and Usayd ibn Hudayr (may Allah be pleased with them both) came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and told him about this, saying: 'O Messenger of Allah, should we not then have intercourse with them during menstruation?' The face of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ changed greatly until we thought he was angry with them. They stood and left. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ sent after them to bring them back and gave them a gift of milk to drink, and we knew he had not been angry with them.
387.id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ketika seorang wanita di antara orang-orang Yahudi haid, mereka tidak makan bersamanya, tidak minum bersamanya, mengusirnya dari rumah, dan ia tidak bersama mereka di rumah-rumah. Nabi ﷺ ditanya tentang hal ini, dan Allah Ta'ala menurunkan: "Mereka bertanya kepadamu tentang haid. Katakanlah: Itu adalah penyakit" [Al-Baqarah: 222]. Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan mereka untuk makan bersama mereka, minum bersama mereka, menyertakan mereka di rumah-rumah, dan melakukan segalanya kecuali jima'. Orang-orang Yahudi berkata: 'Orang ini tidak mau membiarkan apapun dari praktik kami kecuali ia menentang kami di dalamnya.' 'Abbad ibn Bisyr dan Usaid ibn Hudhair (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan memberitahunya tentang hal ini, berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, apakah kami tidak boleh berhubungan intim dengan mereka saat haid?' Wajah Rasulullah ﷺ berubah sangat merah sampai kami mengira beliau marah kepada mereka. Mereka berdiri dan pergi. Rasulullah ﷺ mengutus orang untuk membawa mereka kembali dan memberi mereka susu untuk diminum, dan kami tahu beliau tidak marah kepada mereka.

388.en: Salim ibn 'Abdullah was asked about a man who sleeps with his menstruating wife under one blanket. He said: 'As for us, the family of 'Umar, we avoid them when they are menstruating.'
388.id: Salim ibn 'Abdullah ditanya tentang seorang laki-laki yang tidur dengan istrinya yang sedang haid di bawah satu selimut. Ia berkata: 'Adapun kami, keluarga 'Umar, kami menjauhi mereka ketika mereka sedang haid.'

389.en: Ibn 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) said: 'There is no harm in the leftover ablution water of a woman as long as she is not in janabah or menstruating.'
389.id: Ibn 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: 'Tidak ada masalah dengan sisa air wudhu wanita selama ia tidak dalam keadaan junub atau haid.'

390.en: Al-Hakam said regarding a menstruating woman: 'She places it (the cotton) — meaning on the private part.'
390.id: Al-Hakam berkata mengenai wanita haid: 'Ia menempatkannya (kapas) — yaitu pada kemaluan.'

391.en: It was narrated from Maymunah, the wife of the Prophet ﷺ (may Allah be pleased with her), that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to be intimate with his wives when they were menstruating, as long as there was an izaar (lower garment) reaching to the middle of the thighs or the knees, fastened tightly.
391.id: Diriwayatkan dari Maymunah, istri Nabi ﷺ (radhiyallahu 'anha), bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berhubungan intim dengan istri-istrinya ketika mereka sedang haid, selama ada izaar (pakaian bawah) yang mencapai pertengahan paha atau lutut, diikat erat.

392.en: Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) said: 'I used to comb the hair of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while I was menstruating.'
392.id: Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) berkata: 'Saya biasa menyisir rambut Rasulullah ﷺ sementara saya sedang haid.'

393.en: Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) said: 'I used to comb the hair of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while I was menstruating.'
393.id: Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) berkata: 'Saya biasa menyisir rambut Rasulullah ﷺ sementara saya sedang haid.'

394.en: It was narrated from Nafi' that Ibn 'Umar's slave girls used to wash his feet while they were menstruating, and would hand him the prayer mat.
394.id: Diriwayatkan dari Nafi' bahwa budak-budak perempuan Ibn 'Umar biasa mencuci kakinya sementara mereka sedang haid, dan memberikan kepadanya tikar shalat.

395.en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'A vessel would be brought to me and I would place my mouth on it and drink while I was menstruating. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would then place his mouth on the same spot where I had placed mine and drink. And a bone with meat would be brought and I would bite from it, and he would place his mouth on the spot where I had placed mine and bite from it. Then he would command me to fasten a lower garment while I was menstruating, and he would be intimate with me.'
395.id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Sebuah bejana akan dibawa kepadaku dan saya meletakkan mulutku padanya dan minum sementara saya sedang haid. Rasulullah ﷺ kemudian meletakkan mulutnya pada tempat yang sama di mana saya meletakkan mulutku dan minum. Dan sebuah tulang dengan daging dibawa dan saya menggigitnya, dan beliau meletakkan mulutnya pada tempat di mana saya meletakkan mulutku dan menggigitnya. Kemudian beliau memerintahkanku untuk mengenakan pakaian bawah sementara saya sedang haid, dan beliau berhubungan intim denganku.'

396.en: Ibrahim said: 'It used to be said: A menstruating woman — menstruation is not in her hand. She washes her hand and kneads dough and makes nabidh (a fermented drink).'
396.id: Ibrahim berkata: 'Dahulu dikatakan: Wanita haid — haid bukan di tangannya. Ia mencuci tangannya dan menguleni adonan dan membuat nabidh (minuman fermentasi).'

397.en: Ibrahim said: 'The menstruation of a menstruating woman is not in her hand.' And he used to say: 'A menstruating woman is the beloved of her household.'
397.id: Ibrahim berkata: 'Haid wanita haid bukan di tangannya.' Dan ia biasa berkata: 'Wanita haid adalah kekasih rumah tangganya.'

398.en: Hammad said: 'I asked Ibrahim about shaking hands with a Jew, a Christian, a Zoroastrian, and a menstruating woman.' He saw no need for ablution from it.
398.id: Hammad berkata: 'Saya bertanya kepada Ibrahim tentang berjabat tangan dengan seorang Yahudi, Nasrani, Majusi, dan wanita haid.' Ia tidak melihat kebutuhan berwudhu karena hal itu.

399.en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was in the masjid and said to a girl: 'Pass me the prayer mat (khumrah).' She said: He wanted to spread it and pray on it. She said: 'She is menstruating.' He said: 'Her menstruation is not in her hand.'
399.id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berada di masjid dan berkata kepada seorang gadis: 'Berikan kepadaku tikar shalat (khumrah).' Ia berkata: Beliau ingin menghamparkannya dan shalat di atasnya. Ia berkata: 'Ia sedang haid.' Beliau berkata: 'Haidnya bukan di tangannya.'
